scope: PDT-2585: Billing - No Price component in credit note; total volumes should be empty not 0 (reversal billing run, credit note summary)

upstream.name: billing-run-controller
upstream.usage: test-reversal and test-reversal-save create credit note from invoice

upstream.name: invoice-controller
upstream.usage: summary-data and detailed-data return rows for invoice and credit note documents

upstream.name: billing run documents / invoice credit note
upstream.usage: Credit note document (e.g. id=46045) and its summary/detailed rows

upstream.name: BillingRunDocumentSummaryDataModel / price component models
upstream.usage: Summary and detailed row data; price component names from master data

downstream.name: Invoice/credit note detail page (tabs 2 and 3)
downstream.usage: Displays summary and detailed data; totalVolumes shown as 0 vs empty

downstream.name: GET /invoice/generate-csv/{id}
downstream.usage: Export may use same summary/detailed data

downstream.name: GET /invoice/download-document
downstream.usage: PDF download may rely on document summary/detailed structure

downstream.name: PATCH /invoice/regenerate-compensations
downstream.usage: May depend on document summary/detailed structure

shared: Manual credit or debit note flow (same summary/detailed tabs and DTOs)
integration_points: PATCH /billing-run/test-reversal/{id} and test-reversal-save/{id} with run reversing invoice 39650 -> credit note 46045
GET /invoice/summary-data with credit note id 46045 (price component names present; totalVolumes empty not 0)
Frontend-backend contract: SummaryDataRowParametersResponse totalVolumes empty vs 0 for credit notes
Manual credit/debit note flow using same summary/detailed APIs
Invoice correction and reversal flow (Confluence: reverse all connected debit/credit notes for PODs)

what_could_break.location: Invoice/credit note detail page tabs 2 and 3
what_could_break.reason: Displays price component and totalVolumes; fix may change empty vs 0 handling
Same document model; preview must stay consistent with summary/detailed

what_could_break.location: Services building SummaryDataRowParameters for invoice and credit note
what_could_break.reason: Shared builder for both document types; change for credit note totalVolumes or price component can affect invoices if not guarded

what_could_break.location: Manual credit or debit note - Create (Confluence)
what_could_break.reason: Uses same billing run 2nd tab summary data and same DTOs
Reuses same summary/detailed models; reversal creates credit note from invoice

impact_risk: Medium-High. Single API and DTO set used for both invoice and credit note; frontend and export flows depend on summary/detailed response. Changes to totalVolumes (empty vs 0) or price component names for credit notes must not break invoice display or manual credit/debit note.

confluence_sources.title: Invoice details: 1,2,3 tabs
confluence_sources.relevance: Total volumes: if price component group - always empty; summary/detailed from billing run tabs

confluence_sources.title: Phase 2 - Invoice correction - process
confluence_sources.relevance: Reversal invoice = opposite document; for invoice create credit note

confluence_sources.title: Manual credit or debit note - Create
confluence_sources.relevance: Three tabs: Basic, Summary data, Detailed data; Reversal of invoice type

confluence_sources.title: Service Order Invoice - preview
confluence_sources.relevance: Summary Data tab: separate rows for each price component/group

confluence_sources.title: Product contract Invoice - Preview
confluence_sources.relevance: Total volumes per price component; group of price component display rules

api_contract_notes: SummaryDataRowParameters: priceComponentOrPriceComponentGroupOrItem (1-1024), totalVolumes (numeric), unitOfMeasuresForTotalVolumes, unitPrice, value.
For credit note summary: totalVolumes should be empty (null/omitted) not 0 per business rule; price component names must be present.
